A FAMILY MEMBER WAS DRIVING AT 65 MPH A BRAND NEW 2021 NISSAN ROGUE WITH LESS THAN 3,000 ON US RTE 95 (4 LANE HIGHWAY) IN WALTHAM MA WHEN THE ENGINE STOPPED RUNNING/ LOST POWER AND THEY WERE ABLE QUICKLY PULL INTO BREAKDOWN LANE. THEY EXITED THE VEHICLE AND CLIMBED OVER THE GUARD

RECENTLY PURCHASED A NEW 2021 NISSAN ROGUE.  TO SHIFT TO REVERSE REQUIRES MOVING THE SHIFTER FORWARD.  NOT LIKE ANY OTHER CAR EVER.  PARK HAS ALWAYS BEEN THE FARTHEST FORWARD GEAR SHIFT POSITION.  REVERSE FIRST OR SECOND POSITION TO THE REAR OF PARK.  THIS IS NOT INTUITIVE , AND

narrative.headline: What 2021 Nissan Rogue owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 266 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (22% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
